name: Community Redevelopment Inc.
business: Community Redevelopment Inc. plans to operate as a business holding company targeting strategic acquisitions in technical, accounting, small business financing, healthcare, and business real estate sectors. The company has not earned any revenue for the twelve months ended December 31, 2024.

exposures.sentence: The company Community Redevelopment Inc., will now operate as a business holding company and will target strategic businesses and targeted companies for incremental business growth in targeted verticals, such technical, accounting, small business financing, healthcare and business real estate.
